name: Hearty Potato and Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, cook potatoes, carrots and celery in water until tender, about 20 minutes.
2. Drain the mixture, reserving the liquid and setting the vegetables aside.
3. In the same kettle, sauté onion in butter until soft.
4. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper.
5. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
6. Gently stir in the cooked vegetables.
7. Add 1 cup or more of the reserved cooking liquid until the soup reaches the desired consistency.
